# fianu_control_test (Action)

Runs a Fianu control's rego rules against its input/data fixtures via `POST /entities/artifacts/test`. Equivalent to `fianu console test controls`. Returns per-case pass/fail as progress events; sets diagnostics if any case fails.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `evaluation` (Attributes List) Evaluation cases — must include at least one `rule` case plus the `input`/`data` test fixtures the rule should be evaluated against. Same shape as fianu_control.detail.evaluation; share via `locals` for DRY. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evaluation))
- `name` (String) Display name of the control. Mirrors the resource's `name`.
- `path` (String) Entity key of the control to test (e.g., `checkmarx.sast.vulnerabilities`). Same value as the resource's `path`.

### Optional

- `entity_type` (String) Entity type — defaults to `control`. Set to `gate_control` to test a gate's rules.

<a id="nestedatt--evaluation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evaluation`

Required:

- `content` (String)
- `type` (String)

Optional:

- `engine` (String)
- `label` (String)
